title: piper aurantiacum var. glabrum
intro: Piper aurantiacum var. glabrum, also known as smooth orange pepper, is a plant species in the Piperaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Piper aurantiacum var. glabrum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its essential oil can also be extracted for use in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
